name: English Shortbread Cookies
method: Preheat oven to 350° F. In a large bowl, mix salt, sugar, and flour. Cut butter into dough until crumbly. You will be able to gather up the dough, if it’s too dry add a little water. On a floured flat surface roll out dough and cut into vertical bars, 1 inch thick, two inches wide, 6 inches long. Arrange on baking sheet 2 inches apart. Prick three fork marks as pictured and bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool. Serving Suggestion: English tea, of course! Makes 1 dozen. Olé
